ddls:
CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the manufacturer in the automotive industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the model production ended */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle model */,
  "model_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the model */,
  "model_price" REAL /* Base price of the model */,
  "model_features" TEXT /* List of features included in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "class_icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the vehicle class */,
  "class_features" TEXT /* List of common features for the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of transmission */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission */,
  "gear_count" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "transmission_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivetrains" (
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive train type */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drive train */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive train */,
  "drivetrain_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the drivetrain type */,
  "drivetrain_features" TEXT /* List of features specific to the drivetrain type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of fuel */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel */,
  "fuel_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the fuel type */,
  "fuel_properties" TEXT /* List of properties of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manufacturer, dealer, regulator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "co2_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* CO2 emission in grams per mile */,
  "other_emissions" TEXT /* Other emissions data */,
  "nox_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* NOx emissions in grams per mile */,
  "pm_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* Particulate matter emissions in grams per mile */,
  "evap_emission_grams_per_mile" REAL /* Evaporative emissions in grams per mile */,
  "emission_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the emissions test was conducted */,
  "emission_test_location" TEXT /* Location where the emissions test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id")
)
